title: default testnet silently kills mainnet wallet payments
description: Changing --network default from mainnet to testnet means users with an existing mainnet wallet who run 'nie chat' without --network mainnet get their payment features silently disabled (try_load_wallet_fvks returns None after printing a message). There is no session-aborting error, just a quiet degradation. A real mainnet user is unlikely to know they need to pass --network mainnet and will be confused when /pay does nothing. Fix: either revert the default to mainnet, or at startup print a prominent warning + suggestion when a wallet network mismatch is detected (the existing message at lines 2509-2516 is visible only to users who read stderr).
